← Developer Tools

Password Generator

Generate strong, secure passwords in one click. Choose character types and length up to 64 characters.

Click Generate to create a password
16
664

How to generate a secure password

Choose your preferred password length using the slider (6–64 characters), select which character types to include, then click Generate Password. Copy the result with one click and use it immediately. Generate as many times as you like until you get one you're happy with.

What makes a strong password?

A strong password is at least 12 characters long and combines uppercase letters (A–Z), lowercase letters (a–z), numbers (0–9) and symbols (!@#$%^&*). Length matters more than complexity — a 16-character password using only letters is stronger than an 8-character password using all character types. Avoid passwords based on real words, dates or personal information.

How long should my password be?

Security experts recommend at least 16 characters for accounts where security matters (email, banking, work systems). Shorter passwords of 8–12 characters are adequate for low-risk accounts. For master passwords on password managers, use the maximum length available — 32 characters or more is ideal since you only need to remember one.

Should I use a password manager?

Yes. A password manager lets you use a unique, complex password for every account without needing to memorize them. You only need to remember one strong master password. Popular choices include Bitwarden (free, open-source), 1Password and Dashlane. Reusing the same password across multiple sites is one of the most common security mistakes — if one site is breached, all your accounts become vulnerable.

Is this password generator safe?

Yes. Passwords are generated entirely in your browser using JavaScript's built-in random number generation. No passwords are ever sent to any server, logged or stored anywhere. Your generated password exists only on your screen until you copy and use it.
